name: Ice_Mech

infobox.Special: Flying: Flying units can move over any terrain tile.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theFrozen Titanssquad.
sections.Strategy:
Normally, you have to use allies' or enemies' attack or block damage to free the Ice Mech from its frozen state after firing. This gives it the somewhat unique distinction of being a suitable Ranged Mech in the frontline, using the self-freeze as a pseudo-shield to tank damage.Camila Verais a suitable pilot if playing this way, taking advantage of her immunity to webbing for flexible firing lines every turn.Lily Reedis a good choice as well, using her increased movement on turn 1 to get the Ice Mech into a good position immediately.
However, having a pilot with ashieldon the Ice Mech makes it immune to the self freezing effect of cryo-launcher and lets it drop to the back away from spawning Vek. This makesBethany Jones,Adamand in particularMafanideal pilots of the mech. Alternatively, for aCustom Squad, the Ice Mech can also be paired with a mech that can provide it a shield, such as theDefense MechorPulse Mech.
Since breaking the Ice Mech free from being frozen requires repairing, other pilots who can synergize well includeHarold SchmidtandKazaaakpleth; the former also pushes enemies away upon repairing, while the latter can still use its Mantis ability even when frozen (and will be broken free from Ice upon using it).
Note that units standing or flying on Lava tiles are immune to being frozen, meaning the Ice Mech firing from lava won't freeze itself. This makes it effective as a regular Ranged-class mech in the fight ofVolcanic Hiveif playing with a pilot lacking a shield.
sections.Trivia: - The Ice Mech is the only flying Mech that starts with 3 movement points.

Team

The mech is available as part of the
Frozen Titans
squad.
Strategy
[
]
Normally, you have to use allies' or enemies' attack or block damage to free the Ice Mech from its frozen state after firing. This gives it the somewhat unique distinction of being a suitable Ranged Mech in the frontline, using the self-freeze as a pseudo-shield to tank damage.
Camila Vera
is a suitable pilot if playing this way, taking advantage of her immunity to webbing for flexible firing lines every turn.
Lily Reed
is a good choice as well, using her increased movement on turn 1 to get the Ice Mech into a good position immediately.
However, having a pilot with a
shield
on the Ice Mech makes it immune to the self freezing effect of cryo-launcher and lets it drop to the back away from spawning Vek. This makes
Bethany Jones
,
Adam
and in particular
Mafan
ideal pilots of the mech. Alternatively, for a
Custom Squad
, the Ice Mech can also be paired with a mech that can provide it a shield, such as the
Defense Mech
or
Pulse Mech
.
Since breaking the Ice Mech free from being frozen requires repairing, other pilots who can synergize well include
Harold Schmidt
and
Kazaaakpleth
; the former also pushes enemies away upon repairing, while the latter can still use its Mantis ability even when frozen (and will be broken free from Ice upon using it).
Note that units standing or flying on Lava tiles are immune to being frozen, meaning the Ice Mech firing from lava won't freeze itself. This makes it effective as a regular Ranged-class mech in the fight of
Volcanic Hive
if playing with a pilot lacking a shield.
Trivia
[
]
The Ice Mech is the only flying Mech that starts with 3 movement points.
